links.title: RegiMux Admin
links.tooltip: Open the local RegiMux admin UI

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, alias, registry, operation) (rate(regimux_service_upstream_request_duration_seconds_bucket{job=~"$job",instance=~"$instance",alias=~"$alias",registry=~"$registry"}[$__rate_interval])))
topk(20, sum by (ecosystem, kind, alias, repository, status) (increase(regimux_service_dependency_proxy_pulls_total{job=~"$job",instance=~"$instance",alias=~"$alias"}[$__range])))
topk(20, sum by (ecosystem, kind, alias, repository) (increase(regimux_service_dependency_proxy_policy_denied_pulls_total{job=~"$job",instance=~"$instance",alias=~"$alias"}[$__range])))
